doc: Streaming substrate channel registry. Source of truth for stream.list_channels and the streamingService boot path. See backend/patterns/streaming-substrate-complement-to-mcp-2026-05-15.md.

channels.name: vercel.deploys
channels.description: Live Vercel deploy events as they happen, after signature verification in the vercel-fire-shim

channels.name: stripe.events
channels.description: Stripe webhook events post-signature-verify, broadcast for live financial dashboards

channels.name: corazon.files
channels.description: File save events from Corazon's chokidar watcher

channels.name: meetings.live
channels.description: Live transcript chunks from ecodia-meetings while a meeting is in progress

channels.name: observer.signals
channels.description: PostToolUse observer_signal events from Corazon (no-substrate-write-streak, thin-context, episode-overdue)

channels.name: status_board.writes
channels.description: Every status_board.upsert call broadcast for live dashboards
